sub_modules.butterfly_unit: Combinational radix-2 DIT butterfly: computes Q1.15 fixed-point complex rotation of x[q] with twiddle (cos,sin), then adds/subtracts with x[p] to produce updated pair.
sub_modules.twiddle_rom: Combinational twiddle factor lookup table for N=16 FFT/IFFT (indices 0..8), storing cos_q15/sin_q15 values, with mode selecting conjugation for IFFT.
sub_modules.fft_index_gen: Combinational index generator producing butterfly operand indices (p,q) and twiddle ROM index for a given stage and pair position in the iterative FSM.
sub_modules.bitrev4: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal permutation used to reorder inputs into DIT order before the butterfly stages.
